# WNH Scan

> Barcode-scanning inventory app for hospital departments (Thai UI). Staff scan supply barcodes to record stock counts for the IPISS system.

## Public pages

- [Login](/login): Sign in to the application
- [Forgot password](/forgot-password): Request a password reset email
- [Reset password](/reset-password): Set a new password after email verification

## Authenticated app (login required)

- [Dashboard](/): Home — scan flow overview and volume stats
- [Instant scan](/scan): Build and verify a scan batch, then save
- [Pending queue](/queue): Add items to the department pending queue
- [Close round](/close-round): Review pending queue and finalize a scan round (managers and admins)
- [Department](/department): Manage department catalog and users (managers and admins)
- [Admin](/admin): System administration (admins only)

## Documentation

- [Project context](https://github.com/kttwatt/wnhscan/blob/master/context.md): Architecture, roles, data model, and auth
